name: Cranberry-Orange Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 Orange, peeled and ground with skins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped cranberries, ground orange pieces, raisins, and brown sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, cream the margarine until light and fluffy. Add the egg and beat well. Blend in the vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, and baking powder) to the butter mixture.
4. Stir in the cranberry mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 8-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes or until browned on top.
7. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
8. Cut into bars.
One bar - 86 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 1/2 fat exchange: 14 grams carbohydrate, 2 grams protein, 3 grams fat; 55 mg sodium, 78 mg potassium, 11 mg cholesterol.
